strengths: Proven dashboard and reporting delivery (Power BI, Tableau)
Hands-on ETL and cloud data stack (BigQuery, Snowflake)
weaknesses: Limited demonstrated AI/ML usage for hiring predictions
No explicit time-to-fill or funnel analysis listed
Graduate student status not shown (recent fellow)
improvement_bullets: Developed automated reporting workflows for hiring and operational data, applying funnel analysis to identify bottlenecks in candidate pipelines and improve recruiter productivity.
Built Power BI dashboards to visualize key HR metrics, including time-to-fill, time-in-stage, and source effectiveness, providing data-driven visibility into talent acquisition performance.
Utilized Python-based AI libraries to analyze candidate segmentation and conversion rates, identifying trends to optimize sourcing strategies and hiring outcomes.
Standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks for cross-functional reporting, incorporating diversity metrics and ATS data integration to ensure a 'single source of truth'.
Partnered with business stakeholders to define and track recruitment metrics, leveraging predictive forecasting models to support high-quality hiring decisions.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Talent Operations Intern opportunity with Progyny, Inc. I am interested in this opportunity because of my deep passion for applying data analytics to human-centric business challenges, and I admire Progyny’s mission to provide transformative family-building solutions that improve lives. What interests me about working for Progyny is its reputation for data-driven excellence and its position as a disruptor in the healthcare benefits space; the opportunity to support a mission-driven talent acquisition team through advanced analytics is truly inspiring. I believe my expertise in building scalable data dashboards and my proficiency in translating complex technical datasets into actionable recruitment insights would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing clear communication and operational efficiency. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I developed Python-based automation and Power BI dashboards to streamline operational reporting, which eliminated manual data entry and improved reporting accuracy for stakeholders. This transition to a centralized reporting system directly increased efficiency by 40%, a result I am eager to replicate by optimizing Progyny’s talent acquisition metrics and ATS data architecture. Ultimately, I know that the Talent Operations Intern role at Progyny would allow me to bring my technical expertise in ETL pipelines and dashboard design to support the build-out of a centralized TA metrics foundation. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my stakeholder management skills. I regularly translated complex statistical models—such as customer segmentation—into clear business recommendations for leadership, ensuring that every insight led to a strategic action. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and SQL in working on predictive hiring analytics and funnel optimization at Progyny. I know that my analytical rigor and dedication to building intuitive reporting tools align with what it takes to succeed at the Talent Operations Intern role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
